6772976.journalEntryComment: Affiliative with people and readily seeks out attention. She enjoys gentle cheek petting on her own terms. She has shown sensitivity to certain types of handling, particularly around her lower back, and may respond by quickly turning her head or attempting to nip when uncomfortable.She would do best with an experienced, cat-savvy adopter who can read feline body language and respect her boundaries. Due to her leg amputation, she should be kept indoors only.
